case_title: JOEGH BULLOCK VS. 1-A DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL ASC. et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

DISMISSED. NO FURTHER ACTION TAKEN BY THE COURT. DEFENDANT IS A GOVERNMENT AGENCY. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO FILE A GOVERNMENT CLAIM RESULTS IN DISMISSAL OF THIS CASE. DISMISSAL IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY CLAIM PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE AGAINST PERRY MANN PRODUCTIONS, INC OR THE EXOTIC EROTIC BALL.
